name: HAICHANG OCEA.P.H.DL-0001
summary: HAICHANG OCEA.P.H.DL-0001 is likely referring to Haichang Ocean Park Holdings Ltd., a Chinese developer and operator of marine-themed parks and attractions. The company operates several ocean parks across China, featuring aquariums, animal shows, and amusement rides. Haichang Ocean Park aims to provide entertainment and educational experiences related to marine life.
